name: Les Quatre Alices
short_description: A short visual novel, made in RPG MAKER MV, which has the particularity of having heroines with an ASD, for Autistic Spectrum Disorder.
detailed_description:
A young girl walks in a dark forest.
She meets a mysterious red-haired teenager near a campfire.
The teenager tells her a story.
A story that is far too weird to be true, and yet...

Features

* Les Quatre Alices (The Four Alices) is a short visual novel made in RPG MAKER MV, originally written in French.

* There are 4 Endings (3 Bad, 1 Good) in total.
* It has the peculiarity of having heroines with an ASD, for Autistic Spectrum Disorder.
* Her author, the Quebecois Mia Blais-Côté, also has an ASD.

4 Alice : Lorange Journey is a remake of the plot.

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, German, Norwegian, Italian
